home.title: Welcome to the SMP
home.content:
Welcome to the official wiki for our Scripted SMP studio! Select an article on the left to learn about our lore, rules, and more.

Current Project: Hero Concept.

rules.title: Server Rules
rules.content:
• No Griefing: Respect other players' builds.
  • Scripting: Only approved client-side scripts are allowed.
  • Roleplay: Stay in character during lore events!

original-concept.title: Original Concept
original-concept.content: The original concept was about an item that broke apart and all the civilazations took a piece and dont comunicate to each other anymore. The antagonist is trying to steal all the object parts to unlock `the void`. While the protagonists are trying to collect all the parts to regain the peace. There were 4 main civilzation before we endet the production and also one side civilzation. Main civilzations:Overworld civilization,Nether civilization,Underground civilization and End civilization.

original-concept-end.title: Original Concept end
original-concept-end.content: The original concept end is an fully democratic Civilization and the most advanced. they used the magic to their advantige to create devices that can easily use it for diffrent things and automate them
